text.title: Portfolio Strategy (70/20/10) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying portfolio strategy (70/20/10) end-to-end.

step.name: tag-products
step.action: Tag each product H1/H2/H3 with rationale; untagged default to H1 explicitly.
step.decision-gate: If any product cannot be tagged, escalate to Head of Product.

step.name: compute-allocation
step.action: Sum capacity by horizon; compare to 70/20/10 target.

step.name: register-kill-triggers
step.action: Author kill triggers per horizon + per product where specific.
step.decision-gate: If any horizon has no triggers, reject memo.

step.name: write-rebalance-memo
step.action: Use opus to write the rebalance memo with kill/expand recommendations.

step.name: operate-cadence
step.action: Run quarterly review; auto-flag when trigger conditions hit mid-quarter.
step.decision-gate: If trigger fires mid-quarter, do not wait — convene emergency portfolio review.
